acid.name: Acid
acid.description: Sprays acid. May lower Sp. Def.

acid_spray.name: Acid Spray
acid_spray.description: The user spits fluid that works to melt the target. This harshly reduces the target’s Sp. Def stat.

acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
acrobatics.description: The user nimbly strikes the target. If the user is not holding an item, this attack inflicts massive damage.

acupressure.name: Acupressure
acupressure.description: The user applies pressure to stress points, sharply boosting one of its stats.

after_you.name: After You
after_you.description: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.

ally_switch.name: Ally Switch
ally_switch.description: The user teleports using a strange power and switches its place with one of its allies.

aqua_jet.name: Aqua Jet
aqua_jet.description: The user lunges at the foe at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first.

aqua_ring.name: Aqua Ring
aqua_ring.description: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP on every turn.

aqua_tail.name: Aqua Tail
aqua_tail.description: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

arm_thrust.name: Arm Thrust
arm_thrust.description: Straight-arm punches that strike the foe 2 to 5 times.

assist.name: Assist
assist.description: Attacks randomly with one of the partner’s moves.

assurance.name: Assurance
assurance.description: If the foe has already taken some damage in the same turn, this attack’s power is doubled.

attack_order.name: Attack Order
attack_order.description: The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. Critical hits land more easily.

attract.name: Attract
attract.description: Makes the opposite gender less likely to attack.

aurora_beam.name: Aurora Beam
aurora_beam.description: A rainbow beam. May lower Attack.

autotomize.name: Autotomize
autotomize.description: The user sheds part of its body to make itself lighter and sharply raise its Speed stat.

avalanche.name: Avalanche
avalanche.description: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

beat_up.name: Beat Up
beat_up.description: Party POKéMON join in the attack.

bestow.name: Bestow
bestow.description: The user passes its held item to the target when the target isn’t holding an item.

bind.name: Bind
bind.description: Binds and squeezes the foe for 2-5 turns.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Bites with sharp fangs. May cause flinching.

blast_burn.name: Blast Burn
blast_burn.description: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

blue_flare.name: Blue Flare
blue_flare.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. It may leave the target with a burn.

bolt_strike.name: Bolt Strike
bolt_strike.description: The user charges its target, surrounding itself with a great amount of electricity. It may leave the target with paralysis.

bounce.name: Bounce
bounce.description: Bounces up, then strikes. May paralyze.

brave_bird.name: Brave Bird
brave_bird.description: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. The user also takes serious damage.

brine.name: Brine
brine.description: If the foe’s HP is down to about half, this attack will hit with double the power.

bubble_beam.name: Bubble Beam
bubble_beam.description: An attack that may lower SPEED.

bug_bite.name: Bug Bite
bug_bite.description: The user bites the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

bug_buzz.name: Bug Buzz
bug_buzz.description: The user vibrates its wings to generate a damaging sound wave. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

bulldoze.name: Bulldoze
bulldoze.description: The user stomps down on the ground and attacks everything in the area. Hit Pokémon’s Speed stat is reduced.

bullet_punch.name: Bullet Punch
bullet_punch.description: The user strikes with a tough punch as fast as a bullet. This move always goes first.

calm_mind.name: Calm Mind
calm_mind.description: Raises Sp. Atk and Sp. Def.

captivate.name: Captivate
captivate.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the foe is charmed into sharply lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

charge.name: Charge
charge.description: Charges power to boost the electric move used next.

charge_beam.name: Charge Beam
charge_beam.description: The user fires a concentrated bundle of electricity. It may also raise the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

chatter.name: Chatter
chatter.description: The user attacks using a sound wave based on words it has learned. It may also confuse the foe.

chip_away.name: Chip Away
chip_away.description: Looking for an opening, the user strikes continually. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

circle_throw.name: Circle Throw
circle_throw.description: The user throws the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

clear_smog.name: Clear Smog
clear_smog.description: The user attacks by throwing a clump of special mud. All status changes are returned to normal.

close_combat.name: Close Combat
close_combat.description: The user fights the foe in close without guarding itself. It also cuts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def.

coil.name: Coil
coil.description: The user coils up and concentrates. This raises its Attack and Defense stats as well as its accuracy.

conversion.name: Conversion
conversion.description: Changes type to match a move.

conversion_2.name: Conversion 2
conversion_2.description: Changes type to resist the foe.

copycat.name: Copycat
copycat.description: The user mimics the move used immediately before it. The move fails if no other move has been used yet.

cosmic_power.name: Cosmic Power
cosmic_power.description: Raises DEFENSE and SP. DEF with a mystic power.

cotton_guard.name: Cotton Guard
cotton_guard.description: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically raising the user’s Defense stat.

cross_poison.name: Cross Poison
cross_poison.description: A slashing attack that may also leave the target poisoned. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

crush_grip.name: Crush Grip
crush_grip.description: The foe is crushed with great force. The attack is more powerful the more HP the foe has left.

cut.name: Cut
cut.description: Cuts the foe with sharp scythes, claws, etc.

dark_pulse.name: Dark Pulse
dark_pulse.description: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. It may also make the target flinch.

dark_void.name: Dark Void
dark_void.description: The foe is dragged into a world of total darkness that puts it to sleep.

defend_order.name: Defend Order
defend_order.description: The user calls out its underlings to make a living shield, raising its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

defog.name: Defog
defog.description: Obstacles are moved, reducing the foe’s evasion stat. It can also be used to clear deep fog, etc.

destiny_bond.name: Destiny Bond
destiny_bond.description: If user faints, foe faints too.

dig.name: Dig
dig.description: Digs underground first turn, hits second.

disable.name: Disable
disable.description: Disables the foe's most recent move.

doom_desire.name: Doom Desire
doom_desire.description: Summons strong sunlight to attack 2 turns later.

double_edge.name: Double-Edge
double_edge.description: User runs risks huge recoil damage.

double_hit.name: Double Hit
double_hit.description: The user slams the foe with a tail, etc. The target is hit twice in a row.

draco_meteor.name: Draco Meteor
draco_meteor.description: Comets are summoned down from the sky. The attack’s recoil sharply reduces the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

dragon_pulse.name: Dragon Pulse
dragon_pulse.description: The foe is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user’s gaping mouth.

dragon_rush.name: Dragon Rush
dragon_rush.description: The user tackles the foe while exhibiting overwhelming menace. It may also make the target flinch.

dragon_tail.name: Dragon Tail
dragon_tail.description: The user knocks away the target and drags out another Pokémon in its party. In the wild, the battle ends.

drain_punch.name: Drain Punch
drain_punch.description: An energy-draining punch. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

dream_eater.name: Dream Eater
dream_eater.description: Steals HP from a sleeping victim.

drill_run.name: Drill Run
drill_run.description: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

dual_chop.name: Dual Chop
dual_chop.description: The user attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row.

earth_power.name: Earth Power
earth_power.description: The user makes the ground under the foe erupt with power. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

echoed_voice.name: Echoed Voice
echoed_voice.description: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used every turn, it does greater damage.

egg_bomb.name: Egg Bomb
egg_bomb.description: Eggs are fired at the foe.

electro_ball.name: Electro Ball
electro_ball.description: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the damage.

electroweb.name: Electroweb
electroweb.description: The user captures and attacks opposing Pokémon by using an electric net. It reduces the targets’ Speed stat.

embargo.name: Embargo
embargo.description: It prevents the foe from using its held item. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

ember.name: Ember
ember.description: A small flame attack. May cause a burn.

encore.name: Encore
encore.description: Forces the foe to repeat its last move.

endeavor.name: Endeavor
endeavor.description: Lowers foe's HP to user's HP.

energy_ball.name: Energy Ball
energy_ball.description: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the foe. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

entrainment.name: Entrainment
entrainment.description: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target’s Ability the same as the user’s.

false_swipe.name: False Swipe
false_swipe.description: Always leaves foe with at least 1 HP.

feint.name: Feint
feint.description: An attack that hits a foe using Protect or Detect. It also lifts the effects of those moves.

fiery_dance.name: Fiery Dance
fiery_dance.description: Cloaked in flames, the user dances and flaps its wings. It may also raise the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

final_gambit.name: Final Gambit
final_gambit.description: The user risks everything to attack its target. The user faints but does damage equal to the user’s HP.

fire_fang.name: Fire Fang
fire_fang.description: The user bites with flame-cloaked fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or sustain a burn.

fire_pledge.name: Fire Pledge
fire_pledge.description: A column of fire hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its Grass equivalent, its damage increases into a vast sea of fire.

fire_spin.name: Fire Spin
fire_spin.description: Traps the foe in fire for 2-5 turns.

flail.name: Flail
flail.description: Stronger if the user's HP is low.

flame_burst.name: Flame Burst
flame_burst.description: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages Pokémon next to the target as well.

flame_charge.name: Flame Charge
flame_charge.description: The user cloaks itself with flame and attacks. Building up more power, it raises the user’s Speed stat.

flame_wheel.name: Flame Wheel
flame_wheel.description: An attack that may cause a burn.

flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
flamethrower.description: A powerful fire blast. May cause a burn.

flare_blitz.name: Flare Blitz
flare_blitz.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the foe. The user sustains serious damage, too.

flash.name: Flash
flash.description: Blinds the foe to reduce accuracy.

flash_cannon.name: Flash Cannon
flash_cannon.description: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. It may also lower the foe’s Sp. Def stat.

flatter.name: Flatter
flatter.description: Confuses the foe, but raises its SP. ATK.

fling.name: Fling
fling.description: The user flings its held item at the foe to attack. Its power and effects depend on the item.

fly.name: Fly
fly.description: Flies up on the first turn, then strikes.

focus_blast.name: Focus Blast
focus_blast.description: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

follow_me.name: Follow Me
follow_me.description: Draws attention to make foes attack only the user.

force_palm.name: Force Palm
force_palm.description: The foe is attacked with a shock wave. It may also leave the target paralyzed.

foul_play.name: Foul Play
foul_play.description: The user turns the target’s power against it. The higher the target’s Attack stat, the greater the damage.

freeze_shock.name: Freeze Shock
freeze_shock.description: On the second turn, the user hits the target with electrically charged ice. It may leave the target with paralysis.

frenzy_plant.name: Frenzy Plant
frenzy_plant.description: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

frost_breath.name: Frost Breath
frost_breath.description: The user blows a cold breath on the target. This attack always results in a critical hit.

fusion_bolt.name: Fusion Bolt
fusion_bolt.description: The user throws down a giant thunderbolt. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous flame.

fusion_flare.name: Fusion Flare
fusion_flare.description: The user brings down a giant flame. This attack does greater damage when influenced by an enormous thunderbolt.

future_sight.name: Future Sight
future_sight.description: An attack that hits on 3rd turn.

gastro_acid.name: Gastro Acid
gastro_acid.description: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the foe. The fluid eliminates the effect of the foe’s ability.

gear_grind.name: Gear Grind
gear_grind.description: The user attacks by throwing two steel gears at its target.

giga_impact.name: Giga Impact
giga_impact.description: The user charges at the foe using every bit of its power. The user must rest on the next turn.

glaciate.name: Glaciate
glaciate.description: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This attack reduces the targets’ Speed stat.

glare.name: Glare
glare.description: A move that may cause paralysis.

grass_knot.name: Grass Knot
grass_knot.description: The user snares the foe with grass and trips it. The heavier the foe, the greater the damage.

grass_pledge.name: Grass Pledge
grass_pledge.description: A column of grass hits opposing Pokémon. When used with its water equivalent, its damage increases into a vast swamp.

grass_whistle.name: Grass Whistle
grass_whistle.description: Lulls the foe into sleep with a pleasant melody.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.description: Gravity is intensified for five turns, making moves involving flying unusable and negating Levitation.

grudge.name: Grudge
grudge.description: If the user faints, deletes the PP of the final move.

guard_split.name: Guard Split
guard_split.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Defense and Sp. Def stats with those of its target’s.

gunk_shot.name: Gunk Shot
gunk_shot.description: The user shoots filthy garbage at the foe to attack. It may also poison the target.

gust.name: Gust
gust.description: Strikes the foe with a gust of wind.

hail.name: Hail
hail.description: Summons a hailstorm that strikes every turn.

hammer_arm.name: Hammer Arm
hammer_arm.description: The user swings and hits with its strong and heavy fist. It lowers the user’s Speed, however.

head_charge.name: Head Charge
head_charge.description: The user charges its head into its target, using its powerful guard hair. It also damages the user a little.

head_smash.name: Head Smash
head_smash.description: The user delivers a life-endangering head butt at full power. The user also takes terrible damage.

headbutt.name: Headbutt
headbutt.description: A ramming attack. May cause flinching.

heal_block.name: Heal Block
heal_block.description: The user prevents the foe from using any HP-recovery moves for five turns.

heal_order.name: Heal Order
heal_order.description: The user calls out its underlings to heal it. The user regains up to half of its max HP.

heal_pulse.name: Heal Pulse
heal_pulse.description: The user emits a healing pulse which restores the target’s HP by up to half of its max HP.

healing_wish.name: Healing Wish
healing_wish.description: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its HP restored and status cured.

heart_stamp.name: Heart Stamp
heart_stamp.description: The user unleashes a vicious blow after its cute act makes the target less wary. It may also make the target flinch.

heart_swap.name: Heart Swap
heart_swap.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch stat changes with the foe.

heat_crash.name: Heat Crash
heat_crash.description: The user slams its target with its flame- covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the damage.

heavy_slam.name: Heavy Slam
heavy_slam.description: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater its damage.

hex.name: Hex
hex.description: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status problems.

hidden_power.name: Hidden Power
hidden_power.description: The power varies with the POKéMON.

hone_claws.name: Hone Claws
hone_claws.description: The user sharpens its claws to boost its Attack stat and accuracy.

horn_attack.name: Horn Attack
horn_attack.description: Jabs the foe with a horn.

horn_leech.name: Horn Leech
horn_leech.description: The user drains the target’s energy with its horns. The user’s HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

howl.name: Howl
howl.description: Howls to raise the spirit and boosts ATTACK.

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.description: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. It may also confuse the target.

hydro_cannon.name: Hydro Cannon
hydro_cannon.description: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

hyper_voice.name: Hyper Voice
hyper_voice.description: Loud attack that hits all foes.

ice_ball.name: Ice Ball
ice_ball.description: A 5-turn attack that gains power on successive hits.

ice_burn.name: Ice Burn
ice_burn.description: On the second turn, an ultracold, freezing wind surrounds the target. This may leave the target with a burn.

ice_fang.name: Ice Fang
ice_fang.description: The user bites with cold-infused fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or freeze.

icicle_crash.name: Icicle Crash
icicle_crash.description: The user attacks by harshly dropping an icicle onto the target. It may also make the target flinch.

imprison.name: Imprison
imprison.description: Prevents foes from using moves the user has.

incinerate.name: Incinerate
incinerate.description: The user attacks the target with fire. If the target is holding a Berry, the Berry becomes burnt up and unusable.

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.description: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. It leaves the target with a burn.

ingrain.name: Ingrain
ingrain.description: Restores HP every turn. Cannot switch.

iron_head.name: Iron Head
iron_head.description: The foe slams the target with its steel-hard head. It may also make the target flinch.

judgment.name: Judgment
judgment.description: The user releases countless shots of light. Its type varies with the kind of Plate the user is holding.

last_resort.name: Last Resort
last_resort.description: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

lava_plume.name: Lava Plume
lava_plume.description: An inferno of scarlet flames washes over all Pokémon in battle. It may also inflict burns.

leaf_storm.name: Leaf Storm
leaf_storm.description: A storm of sharp leaves is whipped up. The attack’s recoil sharply reduces the user’s Sp. Atk stat.

leaf_tornado.name: Leaf Tornado
leaf_tornado.description: The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target’s accuracy.

leech_seed.name: Leech Seed
leech_seed.description: Plants a seed to steal HP.

leer.name: Leer
leer.description: Intimidates the foe to lower Defense.

low_sweep.name: Low Sweep
low_sweep.description: The user attacks the target’s legs swiftly, reducing the target’s Speed stat.

lucky_chant.name: Lucky Chant
lucky_chant.description: The user chants an incantation toward the sky, preventing the foe from landing critical hits.

lunar_dance.name: Lunar Dance
lunar_dance.description: The user faints. In return, the Pokémon taking its place will have its status and HP fully restored.

luster_purge.name: Luster Purge
luster_purge.description: Attacks with a burst of light. May lower SP. DEF.

magic_room.name: Magic Room
magic_room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon’s held items lose their effects for five turns.

magma_storm.name: Magma Storm
magma_storm.description: The foe becomes trapped within a maelstrom of fire that rages for two to five turns.

magnet_bomb.name: Magnet Bomb
magnet_bomb.description: The user launches a steel bomb that sticks to the target. This attack will not miss.

me_first.name: Me First
me_first.description: The user tries to cut ahead of the foe to steal and use the foe’s intended move with greater power.

memento.name: Memento
memento.description: The user faints and lowers the foe’s abilities.

metal_burst.name: Metal Burst
metal_burst.description: The user retaliates against the foe that last inflicted damage on it with much greater power.

metronome.name: Metronome
metronome.description: Waggles a finger to use a random move.

milk_drink.name: Milk Drink
milk_drink.description: Restores HP by 1/2 the max HP.

mimic.name: Mimic
mimic.description: Copies a move used by the foe.

mind_reader.name: Mind Reader
mind_reader.description: Ensures the next attack will hit.

miracle_eye.name: Miracle Eye
miracle_eye.description: Allows Psychic moves to hit Dark.

mirror_shot.name: Mirror Shot
mirror_shot.description: The user looses a flash of energy from its polished body. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

mist_ball.name: Mist Ball
mist_ball.description: Attacks with a flurry of down. May lower SP. ATK.

mud_bomb.name: Mud Bomb
mud_bomb.description: The user launches a hard-packed mud ball to attack. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

natural_gift.name: Natural Gift
natural_gift.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

nature_power.name: Nature Power
nature_power.description: The type of attack varies depending on the location.

needle_arm.name: Needle Arm
needle_arm.description: Attacks with thorny arms. May cause flinching.

night_daze.name: Night Daze
night_daze.description: The user lets loose a pitch-black shock wave at its target. It may also lower the target’s accuracy.

night_slash.name: Night Slash
night_slash.description: The user slashes the foe the instant an opportunity arises. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

nightmare.name: Nightmare
nightmare.description: A sleeper loses 1/4 HP every turn.

odor_sleuth.name: Odor Sleuth
odor_sleuth.description: Negates the foe’s efforts to heighten evasiveness.

ominous_wind.name: Ominous Wind
ominous_wind.description: The user creates a gust of repulsive wind. It may also raise all the user’s stats at once.

outrage.name: Outrage
outrage.description: Rampages for 2-3 turns, then confuses user.

pain_split.name: Pain Split
pain_split.description: Averages HP between user and foe.

pay_day.name: Pay Day
pay_day.description: Throws coins. Money is earned after battle.

payback.name: Payback
payback.description: If the user can use this attack after the foe attacks, its power is doubled.

peck.name: Peck
peck.description: Jabs the foe with a beak.

petal_dance.name: Petal Dance
petal_dance.description: Dances for 2-3 turns, then confuses user.

pluck.name: Pluck
pluck.description: The user pecks the foe. If the foe is holding a Berry, the user plucks it and gains its effect.

poison_gas.name: Poison Gas
poison_gas.description: A move that may poison the foe.

poison_jab.name: Poison Jab
poison_jab.description: The foe is stabbed with a tentacle or arm steeped in poison. It may also poison the foe.

poison_sting.name: Poison Sting
poison_sting.description: A toxic sting. May poison the foe.

power_gem.name: Power Gem
power_gem.description: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

power_split.name: Power Split
power_split.description: The user employs its psychic power to average its Attack and Sp. Atk stats with those of the target’s.

power_trick.name: Power Trick
power_trick.description: The user employs its psychic power to switch its Attack stat with its Defense stat.

power_whip.name: Power Whip
power_whip.description: The user violently whirls its vines or tentacles to harshly lash the foe.

present.name: Present
present.description: May heal or damage the foe.

psybeam.name: Psybeam
psybeam.description: Fired a peculiar ray. May confuse the foe.

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.description: A powerful psychic attack. May lower Sp. Def.

psycho_shift.name: Psycho Shift
psycho_shift.description: Using its psychic power of suggestion, the user transfers its status problems to the target.

psyshock.name: Psyshock
psyshock.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

psystrike.name: Psystrike
psystrike.description: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

punishment.name: Punishment
punishment.description: This attack’s power increases the more the foe has powered up with stat changes.

quash.name: Quash
quash.description: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

quick_attack.name: Quick Attack
quick_attack.description: Lets the user get in the first hit.

quick_guard.name: Quick Guard
quick_guard.description: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves. If used in succession, its chance of failing rises.

quiver_dance.name: Quiver Dance
quiver_dance.description: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. It boosts the user’s Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

rage_powder.name: Rage Powder
rage_powder.description: The user scatters a cloud of irritating powder to draw attention to itself. Opponents aim only at the user.

razor_leaf.name: Razor Leaf
razor_leaf.description: Slashes with a sharp leaf. High crit ratio.

razor_shell.name: Razor Shell
razor_shell.description: The user cuts its target with sharp shells. This attack may also lower the target’s Defense stat.

recover.name: Recover
recover.description: Recovers up to half the user’s maximum HP.

reflect_type.name: Reflect Type
reflect_type.description: The user reflects the target’s type, making it the same type as the target.

relic_song.name: Relic Song
relic_song.description: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of those listening. It may also induce sleep.

rest.name: Rest
rest.description: The user sleeps 2 turns to fully heal.

retaliate.name: Retaliate
retaliate.description: The user gets revenge for a fainted ally. If an ally fainted in the previous turn, this attack’s damage increases.

revenge.name: Revenge
revenge.description: Double power if hit this turn.

roar.name: Roar
roar.description: Scares the wild foe to end battle.

roar_of_time.name: Roar Of Time
roar_of_time.description: The user blasts the foe with power that distorts even time. The user must rest on the next turn.

rock_climb.name: Rock Climb
rock_climb.description: A charging attack that may also leave the foe confused. It can also be used to scale rocky walls.

rock_polish.name: Rock Polish
rock_polish.description: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. It can sharply raise the Speed stat.

rock_slide.name: Rock Slide
rock_slide.description: Throws rocks at foes. May flinch.

rock_wrecker.name: Rock Wrecker
rock_wrecker.description: The user launches a huge boulder at the foe to attack. It must rest on the next turn, however.

round.name: Round
round.description: The user attacks the target with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the attack do greater damage.

sacred_sword.name: Sacred Sword
sacred_sword.description: The user attacks by slicing with its long horns. The target’s stat changes don’t affect this attack’s damage.

sand_tomb.name: Sand Tomb
sand_tomb.description: Traps and hurts the foe in quicksand for 2 to 5 turns.

scald.name: Scald
scald.description: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

searing_shot.name: Searing Shot
searing_shot.description: An inferno of scarlet flames torches everything around the user. It may leave targets with a burn.

secret_sword.name: Secret Sword
secret_sword.description: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn does physical damage to the target.

seed_bomb.name: Seed Bomb
seed_bomb.description: The user slams a barrage of hard- shelled seeds down on the foe from above.

seed_flare.name: Seed Flare
seed_flare.description: The user generates a shock wave from within its body. It may also lower the target’s Sp. Def.

shadow_claw.name: Shadow Claw
shadow_claw.description: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

shadow_force.name: Shadow Force
shadow_force.description: The user disappears, then strikes the foe on the second turn. It hits even if the foe used Protect.

shadow_sneak.name: Shadow Sneak
shadow_sneak.description: The user extends its shadow and attacks the foe from behind. This move always goes first.

shell_smash.name: Shell Smash
shell_smash.description: The user breaks its shell, lowering its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply raising Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

shift_gear.name: Shift Gear
shift_gear.description: The user rotates its gears, raising its Attack and sharply raising its Speed.

simple_beam.name: Simple Beam
simple_beam.description: The user’s mysterious psychic wave changes the target’s Ability to Simple.

sing.name: Sing
sing.description: Sings a Lullaby. May induce sleep.

skill_swap.name: Skill Swap
skill_swap.description: The user swaps special abilities with the target.

sky_drop.name: Sky Drop
sky_drop.description: The user takes the target into the sky, then drops it during the next turn. The target cannot attack while in the sky.

slam.name: Slam
slam.description: Slams the foe with a long tail, vine, etc.

sleep_talk.name: Sleep Talk
sleep_talk.description: Uses a random move while asleep.

sludge_wave.name: Sludge Wave
sludge_wave.description: It swamps the area around the user with a giant sludge wave. It may also poison those hit.

smack_down.name: Smack Down
smack_down.description: The user throws a stone or projectile to attack an opponent. A flying Pokémon will fall to the ground when hit.

smelling_salts.name: Smelling Salts
smelling_salts.description: Powerful against paralyzed foes, but also heals them.

snarl.name: Snarl
snarl.description: The user yells as if it is ranting about something, making the target’s Sp. Atk stat decrease.

snatch.name: Snatch
snatch.description: Steals the effects of the move the foe uses next.

snore.name: Snore
snore.description: An attack useable only while asleep.

soak.name: Soak
soak.description: The user shoots a torrent of water at the target and changes the target’s type to Water.

soft_boiled.name: Soft Boiled
soft_boiled.description: Restores HP by 1/2 the user's max HP.

spacial_rend.name: Spacial Rend
spacial_rend.description: The user tears the foe along with the space around it. This move has a high critical-hit ratio.

spikes.name: Spikes
spikes.description: Hurts foes when they switch in.

spit_up.name: Spit Up
spit_up.description: Releases stockpiled power (the more the better).

stealth_rock.name: Stealth Rock
stealth_rock.description: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the foe. The trap hurts foes that switch into battle.

steamroller.name: Steamroller
steamroller.description: The user crushes its targets by rolling over them with its rolled-up body. This attack may make the target flinch.

stockpile.name: Stockpile
stockpile.description: Charges up power for up to 3 turns.

stomp.name: Stomp
stomp.description: Stomps the foe with a big foot. May cause flinching.

stone_edge.name: Stone Edge
stone_edge.description: The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone. It has a high critical-hit ratio.

stored_power.name: Stored Power
stored_power.description: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user’s stats are raised, the greater the damage.

storm_throw.name: Storm Throw
storm_throw.description: The user strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit.

strength.name: Strength
strength.description: Builds enormous power, then slugs the foe.

struggle.name: Struggle
struggle.description: Used when out of PP. Recoil 1/4 damage.

struggle_bug.name: Struggle Bug
struggle_bug.description: While resisting, the user attacks the opposing Pokémon. The targets’ Sp. Atk stat is reduced.

submission.name: Submission
submission.description: A body slam. User takes recoil.

sucker_punch.name: Sucker Punch
sucker_punch.description: This move enables the user to attack first. It fails if the foe is not readying an attack, however.

supersonic.name: Supersonic
supersonic.description: Confuses the foe with sound waves.

swagger.name: Swagger
swagger.description: Confuses foe, but raises its Attack.

swallow.name: Swallow
swallow.description: Absorbs stockpiled power and restores HP.

swift.name: Swift
swift.description: Sprays star-shaped rays that never miss.

switcheroo.name: Switcheroo
switcheroo.description: The user trades held items with the foe faster than the eye can follow.

swords_dance.name: Swords Dance
swords_dance.description: A dance that sharply raises Attack.

synchronoise.name: Synchronoise
synchronoise.description: Using an odd shock wave, the user inflicts damage on any Pokémon of the same type in the area around it.

tail_glow.name: Tail Glow
tail_glow.description: Flashes a light that sharply raises SP. ATK.

tail_slap.name: Tail Slap
tail_slap.description: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. It hits the target two to five times in a row.

tail_whip.name: Tail Whip
tail_whip.description: Wags the tail to lower Defense.

tailwind.name: Tailwind
tailwind.description: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that ups the Speed of all party Pokémon for three turns.

take_down.name: Take Down
take_down.description: A reckless charge. User takes recoil damage.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Taunts the foe into only using attack moves.

techno_blast.name: Techno Blast
techno_blast.description: The user fires a beam of light at its target. The type changes depending on the Drive the user holds.

teeter_dance.name: Teeter Dance
teeter_dance.description: Confuses all POKéMON on the scene.

telekinesis.name: Telekinesis
telekinesis.description: The user makes the target float with its psychic power. The target is easier to hit for three turns.

texture.name: Texture
texture.description: Changes type to match top move.

thief.name: Thief
thief.description: While attacking, it may steal the foe’s held item.

thrash.name: Thrash
thrash.description: Rampages for 2-3 turns, then confuses user.

thunder_fang.name: Thunder Fang
thunder_fang.description: The user bites with electrified fangs. It may also make the foe flinch or become paralyzed.

thunderbolt.name: Thunderbolt
thunderbolt.description: A strong thunder blast. May paralyze.

torment.name: Torment
torment.description: Torments the foe and stops successive use of a move.

toxic_spikes.name: Toxic Spikes
toxic_spikes.description: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the foe’s feet. They poison foes that switch into battle.

transform.name: Transform
transform.description: The user transforms into the foe.

tri_attack.name: Tri Attack
tri_attack.description: Fires 3 beams. May burn, freeze, or paralyze.

trick_room.name: Trick Room
trick_room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which slower Pokémon get to move first for five turns.

triple_kick.name: Triple Kick
triple_kick.description: Hits three times with rising power.

trump_card.name: Trump Card
trump_card.description: The fewer PP this move has, the more power it has for attack.

u_turn.name: U Turn
u_turn.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

v_create.name: V Create
v_create.description: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. It lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

vacuum_wave.name: Vacuum Wave
vacuum_wave.description: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the foe. This move always goes first.

venoshock.name: Venoshock
venoshock.description: The user drenches the target in a special poisonous liquid. Its power is doubled if the target is poisoned.

vine_whip.name: Vine Whip
vine_whip.description: Strikes the foe with slender, whiplike vines.

volt_switch.name: Volt Switch
volt_switch.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

volt_tackle.name: Volt Tackle
volt_tackle.description: A life-risking tackle that slightly hurts the user.

wake_up_slap.name: Wake Up Slap
wake_up_slap.description: This attack inflicts high damage on a sleeping foe. It also wakes the foe up, however.

water_pledge.name: Water Pledge
water_pledge.description: A column of water strikes the target. When combined with its fire equivalent, the damage increases and a rainbow appears.

weather_ball.name: Weather Ball
weather_ball.description: Type and power change with weather.

wide_guard.name: Wide Guard
wide_guard.description: The user and its allies are protected from wide-ranging attacks for one turn. If used in succession, its chance of failing rises.

wild_charge.name: Wild Charge
wild_charge.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. It also damages the user a little.

wish.name: Wish
wish.description: A wish that restores HP. It takes time to work.

wonder_room.name: Wonder Room
wonder_room.description: The user creates a bizarre area in which Pokémon’s Defense and Sp. Def stats are swapped for five turns.

wood_hammer.name: Wood Hammer
wood_hammer.description: The user slams its rugged body into the foe to attack. The user also sustains serious damage.

work_up.name: Work Up
work_up.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

worry_seed.name: Worry Seed
worry_seed.description: A seed that causes worry is planted on the foe. It prevents sleep by making its ability Insomnia.

wring_out.name: Wring Out
wring_out.description: The user powerfully wrings the foe. The more HP the foe has, the greater this attack’s power.

x_scissor.name: X Scissor
x_scissor.description: The user slashes at the foe by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

yawn.name: Yawn
yawn.description: Puts foe to sleep next turn.
